smoke.detail: On the box (rosenbluth): pixi install solved endpoints/lipophilicity/rdkit_crippen (pixi.lock has a real linux-64 section, rdkit 2026.03.3 with sha256 hashes; caches forced under /zfs, nothing in $HOME). Direct smoke `pixi run --manifest-path pixi.toml python run.py --input tests/fixtures/fto43.smi --output ...` => logP_crippen=0.0909, MR=13.31 (finite, in band -2..8). `pixi run pytest tests/test_model_rdkit_crippen.py -m model -q` => 1 passed (validates output against core.schemas.OutputRecord). Fast tier on laptop: 148 passed, 1 deselected.

note: Walking-skeleton model + canonical model-folder template. Uniform CLI run.py (--input/--output/[--gpu ignored]) emits OutputRecord-shaped JSON (endpoint_values={logP_crippen (log, up=more lipophilic), MR}); invalid SMILES -> null values + raw.error, no crash. logP != logD honored (F-12: no pKa applied here). Lock solved on the box, committed from laptop. Note: FTO-43 fixture SMILES is the documented placeholder from t09 (acetic acid); smoke asserts finite/plausible, not a hard value, so the real-structure swap does not affect this pass.
